zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Savoie I於1178年5月27日出生在法國o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊艾格貝勒時，他的父親Humbert III de Savoie41歲，母親Béatrice de Vienne19歲。他於1195年5月與Marguerite de Genève在法國薩伏伊結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1233年3月8日在義大利皮蒙特托利諾蒙卡列里享年54歲，埋葬在義大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞雷吉 艾米麗雅巴尼洛三 米歇爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Savoie I于1178年5月27日出生在法国o-阿爾培斯薩伏伊艾格貝勒时，他的父亲Humbert III de Savoie41岁，母亲Béatrice de Vienne19岁。他于1195年5月与Marguerite de Genève在法国薩伏伊结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1233年3月8日在意大利皮蒙特托利諾蒙卡列里享年54岁，埋葬在意大利艾米利亞-洛馬尼亞雷吉 艾米麗雅巴尼洛三 米歇爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Savoie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Pierre, Marcel, Damien, Jacques, Normand, Raoul, Alphonse, Antoine, Armand, Julien, Alcee.
French: habitational name from Savoy (French name Savoie), a region in the southeastern part of France, or from (La) Savoie, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Savoy .

History: Savoy was consolidated in the 11th century by count Humbert the White-Handed (Humbert aux blanches-mains). He was the founder of the great European noble house of Savoy, with large holdings of territory in France, Switzerland, and present-day Italy.

variants.name: Savoy
meanings: Altered form of French   Savoie  . It is also found in England, as an Anglicized surname of Huguenot origin.

variants.name: Savoia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Salvatore, Antonio, Dante, Enzo, Franco, Italo, Piero, Reno, Umberto, Vito.
Italian: habitational name from Savoy, in France, named Savoia in Italian. See Savoie .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Savoie I was born on 27 May 1178, in Aiguebelle, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Humbert III de Savoie, was 41 and his mother, Béatrice de Vienne, was 19. He married Marguerite de Genève in May 1195, in Savoie, France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 8 March 1233, in Moncalieri, Turin, Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 54, and was buried in San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Savoie I est né le 27 mai 1178, à Aiguebelle, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Humbert III de Savoie, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Vienne, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite de Genève en mai 1195, à Savoie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mars 1233, à Moncalieri, Torino, Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Italie.

de.San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emi: San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Italien
de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Savoie I am 27. Mai 1178 in Aiguebelle, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Humbert III de Savoie 41 und seine Mutter Béatrice de Vienne 19. Er hat im Mai 1195 in Savoyen, Frankreich Marguerite de Genève geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 8. März 1233 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Moncalieri, Torino, Piemonte, Italien und wurde in San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Savoie I è nato il il 27 maggio 1178 nel Aiguebelle, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Humbert III de Savoie, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de Vienne, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite de Genève nel maggio 1195, nel Savoia, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 marzo 1233, nel Moncalieri, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Savoie Iが1178年5月27日にフランスルhoネ-アルペスサボイエイグエベルで生まれた時，父Humbert III de Savoieは41歳，母Béatrice de Vienneは19歳であった。1195年5月にフランスサボイでMarguerite de Genèveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1233年3月8日にイタリアピエモントトリノモンカリーリで54歳で死去し，イタリアエミリア-ロマグナレグジオ エミリアバグノロサン ミチェルにて埋葬された。

ko.San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emi: 이탈리아 에미리아-로마그나 레조 에미리야 바뇰로 산 미셸
ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Savoie I(이)가 1178년 5월 27일 프랑스 ho니-알프스 서아보이 아익벨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Humbert III de Savoie(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de Vienne(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1195년 5월 프랑스 서아보이에서 Marguerite de Genève(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1233년 3월 8일 이탈리아 피몽 토리노 몬캘리리에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 에미리아-로마그나 레조 에미리야 바뇰로 산 미셸에 묻혔다.

pt.San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emi: San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Itália
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Savoie I nasceu em 27 de maio de 1178, em Aiguebelle, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Humbert III de Savoie, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Vienne, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite de Genève em maio de 1195, em Savoie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de março de 1233, em Moncalieri, Torino, Piemonte, Itália, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Itália.

ru.San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emi: сан мишель, багнолоу, регио эмеля, эмеля-ромагна, Италия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Savoie I родился 27 мая 1178 г. в местности эигуебелл, савои, рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Humbert III de Savoie было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Vienne, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite de Genève май 1195 г. в местности савои, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 8 марта 1233 г. в местности монкалиири, торино, пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности сан мишель, багнолоу, регио эмеля, эмеля-ромагна, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Savoie I nació el 27 de mayo de 1178, en Aiguebelle, Savoie, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Humbert III de Savoie, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Vienne, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Marguerite de Genève en mayo de 1195, en Savoie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de marzo de 1233, en Moncalieri, Torino, Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en San Michele, Bagnolo, Reggio Emilia, Emilia-Romagna, Italia.
